results.title: Chris Lawrie
highlights:
Senior AI & ML Engineer · Agentic AI · Deep Learning · Aon HCA
...
Senior AI Engineer at [Aon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aon)
...
Senior AI and ML engineer with nearly eight years building and shipping production AI systems within Aon's Human Capital Solutions division. I work across the full stack — model research, training, backend engineering, cloud architecture, CI/CD, and product integration — taking ownership of products end-to-end from first principles through to client-facing deployment at scale. My core work sits at the intersection of deep learning and software engineering. I've designed and owned two production neural network systems: DeepMatch, a custom ULMFiT/LSTM model for job taxonomy mapping that now runs over a million predictions a day on Databricks; and the Pay Inference Model, a proprietary PyTorch regression model that produces a global compensation picture for thousands of enterprise clients, with monotonicity constraints baked into the architecture to prevent inversion errors at inference time. More recently I've been leading Aon's move into agentic AI — building production LangGraph agents (Job Matching Agent and Talent Intelligence Assistant), contributing to an in-house agent-serving platform with SSE streaming and session management, and advising teams across the business on AI adoption and tooling. The through-line across all of it is taking technically complex AI work and making it reliable, scalable, and genuinely useful in production. I'm a Warwick MMathPhys graduate (top of class) and an AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner. Always interested in connecting with others working at the frontier of applied AI.
...
Lead AI engineer within Human Capital Solutions, driving Aon's agentic AI strategy. Operating across the full product lifecycle — from model research and backend engineering through to cloud architecture, CI/CD, and frontend integration — while also serving AI capability across the wider business and advising other teams on adopting AI tooling and best practice. Job Matching Agent — A conversational AI agent built with LangGraph that guides users through mapping any job title or description to Aon's internal taxonomy. The agent iteratively interviews users, drawing on full taxonomy knowledge to progressively refine to a precise job code. In production serving clients in 2025. Talent Intelligence Assistant — A GenAI layer embedded within the Talent Intelligence product enabling natural language access to compensation predictions. Users can blend multiple model outputs conversationally, removing friction imposed by the standard UI. In production in 2025. Agent AI Platform — Significant contributor to a Python/FastAPI backend purpose-built for serving LangGraph agents at scale. Supports SSE streaming, thread and session management, and checkpointing — built in-house as Aon's own alternative to frameworks like CopilotKit. Designed to be model-agnostic, with Anthropic Agent SDK support planned. Mentoring one junior engineer. Lead permanent AI/ML engineer within HCS, working alongside contractors to set the technical direction for AI across the division.
...
Joined HCS working across a blend of client-facing and internal data science projects. Client work spanned strategic workforce modelling, pay equity analysis, and attrition analytics — delivering insights through regression modelling, clustering, Tableau, and SQL. Internal projects included boutique analytical work such as cosine similarity and trigram-based approaches to fuzzy matching and text analytics. Alongside this consulting-style work, began developing the early neural network models for automated job taxonomy mapping almost from day one — the foundational work that would grow into DeepMatch. This hands-on ML engineering gradually became the primary focus of the role and defined the natural transition into a senior ML engineering position.

results.title: Marco Aloisi
highlights:
I am a Junior Software Engineer passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Big Data, and emerging technologies. My curiosity to solve complex problems led me into the world of data, where I now specialize in building AI-powered solutions that optimize workflows, unlock insights, and drive digital transformation. I work with machine learning and deep learning frameworks such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, LangChain, and HuggingFace. My experience includes developing multi-agent LLM systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and AI-driven automation to create scalable and practical solutions. I began my journey with data analysis and visualization projects, refining my skills in Python, Power BI, and workflow automation. Over time, I expanded into advanced AI, focusing on building intelligent platforms that support multiple departments. My passion for sports has instilled values of perseverance, discipline, and teamwork, qualities I bring into every project and collaboration. I believe interdisciplinary collaboration and effective communication are key to building innovative solutions. My goal is to make a real impact by applying AI and data science to solve business challenges, optimize decision-making, and enhance human interaction with technology. Always eager to learn, I enjoy connecting with professionals who share the drive to push the boundaries of AI.

# Applied Cyber Security Researcher
...
### Applied Cyber Security Researcher
...
As an Applied Cyber Security Researcher, you will spend your time researching emerging threats, analyzing various security data sets, and operationalizing intelligence into practical security outcomes. Your day work will involve malware and adversary behavior analysis, proactive threat hunting, development of detections and signals, and engineering tactical solutions to address evolving risks. You will collaborate with incident response and security operations teams to support investigations, enhance detection coverage, and integrate new security capabilities into Aon’s environment.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for the role of AI-driven content understanding across the Trust ecosystem.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)

engineering and product

# Data Scientist

Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.

Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
